name: Pixel Pulse Audio
author: joeskolengaden
description: Live audio-reactive lighting: captures a USB audio input, analyzes it in real time (level / bands / beat), and modulates the channel data so the lights react to the room audio. Phase 1: level->brightness, beat->flash.

settingsSchema.label: Only while a sequence is playing
Physical switch
settingsSchema.help: Gate the plugin with a hardware switch wired to a GPIO pin (read ~2x/sec).

settingsSchema.label: GPIO number
settingsSchema.help: Linux/sysfs GPIO number of the switch pin (e.g. BBB P9.12 = 60; on most Pis this is the BCM number). Use a pull resistor.

settingsSchema.label: Switch active level
settingsSchema.help: high = pin high enables the plugin; low = pin low enables (switch to ground with pull-up).

settingsSchema.label: Audio input device
settingsSchema.help: ALSA capture device for the USB input, e.g. hw:1,0

settingsSchema.label: Noise gate
settingsSchema.help: Below this level is treated as silence.

settingsSchema.label: Beat sensitivity
settingsSchema.help: Lower = more beats detected.

settingsSchema.label: Input channel
settingsSchema.help: Stereo mix, or just the left/right channel of the input.

settingsSchema.label: Auto level (per song)
settingsSchema.help: Slowly auto-adjusts the input gain so quiet and loud songs drive the lights equally.

settingsSchema.label: Auto-gain (AGC)
settingsSchema.help: Normalize loudness to the room automatically. Off = absolute, set with Input gain.

settingsSchema.label: AGC speed
settingsSchema.help: How fast auto-gain adapts. Higher = snappier, lower = steadier.

settingsSchema.label: Smoothing
settingsSchema.help: Eases the fall of reactions so they breathe instead of flicker (instant attack, slow release).

settingsSchema.label: Level → brightness
settingsSchema.help: Design brightness follows loudness.

settingsSchema.label: Beat → flash
settingsSchema.help: White flash on each beat.

settingsSchema.label: Visualizer
settingsSchema.help: Generate pixels directly from the audio (overrides the design over the range).

settingsSchema.label: Spectral hue drive
settingsSchema.help: Shift the design's hue with the bass/treble balance.

settingsSchema.label: Audio → speed
settingsSchema.help: Modulate playback speed from the audio. Light-only sequences (audio-backed shows are slaved to their media clock).

settingsSchema.label: Speed amount
settingsSchema.help: Max speed-up at full level/beat.

settingsSchema.label: Spatial (xLights layout)
settingsSchema.help: Render the whole display from the audio by each prop's real-world position. Requires an uploaded xlights_rgbeffects.xml; overrides the range pipeline.

settingsSchema.label: Spatial mode
settingsSchema.help: 31 live styles incl. WLED-inspired meters + organic (fire2012/aurora/noise/twinkle): beats (bloom/spike/fireworks/confetti), frequency (spectrum/radial/bars/colorwash), level (vu/pulse/grow), motion (chase/wave/rain/sparkle/strobe/spin/ripple/comet/plasma/scan/fire).

settingsSchema.label: Model group
settingsSchema.help: Restrict the effect to one xLights model group (options come from the uploaded layout).

settingsSchema.label: Colour palette
settingsSchema.help: Themed colours for every design (auto = per-design rainbow hues). In smart mode the palette is auto-chosen to match the music.

settingsSchema.label: Auto design change
settingsSchema.help: off = fixed mode; time/beats = rotate the modes; smart = classify the music live (energy / tempo / bass-treble / beat) and auto-pick the designs that fit, switching on song changes.

settingsSchema.label: Auto-change every
settingsSchema.help: Interval for time-based auto design change.

settingsSchema.label: Layout file (xlights_rgbeffects.xml)
settingsSchema.help: Upload xlights_rgbeffects.xml; parsed on-device into per-prop positions + channel ranges.
